test.name: Wrong ID prefix is reported and explained
test.description: Run schema validation against mid-research-flynn-bad-id-prefix, the clean scenario with one mutation: a person_evidence entry has id 'x_001' instead of the required 'pe_' prefix. The validator emits one error. Exercises the checkIdPrefix path.

input.user_message: Validate the project files for schema compliance.

judge_context: Should report that validation FAILED — must not claim the files are valid
Should surface the specific error: person_evidence[0]'s id 'x_001' should start with 'pe_'
Should explain the ID-prefix convention (person_evidence ids must begin with 'pe_') and suggest a fix (rename the id to a 'pe_' value)
Should NOT route to check-warnings or proof-conclusion — an ID-format violation is a structural schema error this skill owns
